knowledge_gate.label: Knowledge Gate
knowledge_gate.description: Controls who knows a fact and when.

ability_gate.label: Ability Gate
ability_gate.description: Controls ability availability and mastery by Context.

status_change.label: Status Change
status_change.description: Tracks character, faction, or world state changes.

event_anchor.label: Event Anchor
event_anchor.description: Defines an event as active story state.

item_state.label: Item State
item_state.description: Tracks object ownership, condition, or use.

rule_constraint.label: Rule Constraint
rule_constraint.description: World or system rule that should constrain writing.

behavior_constraint.label: Behavior Constraint
behavior_constraint.description: Character, faction, or culture behavior guidance.

age_gate.label: Age Gate
age_gate.description: Controls age, school year, or maturation state.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.description: Places a Lorecard at a story point, boundary, transition, or future-guard Context.
